items.title: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
items.dek: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.
items.body: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Whale found dead near Danish island after German rescue operation
items.dek: Wildlife experts had previous criticised the operation, saying it would only cause the animal more distress.
items.body: Wildlife experts had previous criticised the operation, saying it would only cause the animal more distress.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Democratic governor under fire over clemency for 2020 election denier
items.dek: Tina Peters, a Republican former county clerk, is serving a nine-year sentence for tampering with election equipment.
items.body: Tina Peters, a Republican former county clerk, is serving a nine-year sentence for tampering with election equipment.
